name: PC Deals Analysis: August 24-31, 2002
description: With three weeks to go in the back-to-school promotion season, the market is in the midst of adding enormous technology bang for the buyer's buck. Pentium 4 2.53 GHz high-end microprocessors, too expensive for PC Deals' mass-market focus to date, exploded onto our radar screen, while 2.26 GHz machines are now under $900. Led by Compaq, this week's deals include a 2.0A GHz Pentium 4 with monitor for under $750, and a 2.26 GHz machine with monitor for under $800.
